{{Quote|Go speak with Tiarsis in the Cantina. She knows all the rumors and may know some people who need help.|[[Rydel Delan]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:T" />}}
'''Tiarsis''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businesswoman who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she resided aboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], where she owned the local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. Hence, she was known as the best informed person on the station.<ref name="SWG:T" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] working for [[Rydel Delan]], Tansarii Point's brawling master, helped Tiarsis with a [[Ryzer|bully]] who was scaring away customers and making a mess in the cantina. While doing so, the spacer discovered that a group of renegades calling themselves the [[Genesis Red (gang)|Genesis Red]] was planning to sabotage the station. The spacer later fought and defeated the criminals, saving the lives of many beings on the station.<ref name="SWG:T" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tiarsis appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:T" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Tiarsis was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
